reviews.comment:
Excelente lugar para hacer un descanso , buenos baños, muy limpio todo, buena atención y precios repuestos de iluminación gral del vehículo, hace tiempo no veía un ACA en esas condiciones. Recomendado.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent place to take a break, good bathrooms, very clean throughout, good service and prices for general vehicle lighting replacements. I haven't seen an ACA in such good condition in a while. Recommended.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9804125904812315909/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQxbzdmVnF3RRAB
